input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.3.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.3.5
            TITLE: wiring that is not part of the tractive system must not use orange wiring or conduit.

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.3.5: Wiring that is not part of the Tractive System must not use orange wiring or conduit.
EV.6.3.5 Wiring that is not part of the Tractive System must not use orange wiring or conduit.

final_answer: Wiring that is not part of the Tractive System must not use orange wiring or conduit.
